game.title: Portal 2
game.description: Sequel to the acclaimed Portal (2007), Portal 2 pits the protagonist of the original game, Chell, and her new robot friend, Wheatley, against more puzzles conceived by GLaDOS, an A.I. with the sole purpose of testing the Portal Gun's mechanics and taking revenge on Chell for the events of Portal. As a result of several interactions and revelations, Chell once again pushes to escape Aperture Science Labs.

localized_description.text: Sequel to the acclaimed Portal (2007), Portal 2 pits the protagonist of the original game, Chell, and her new robot friend, Wheatley, against more puzzles conceived by GLaDOS, an A.I. with the sole purpose of testing the Portal Gun's mechanics and taking revenge on Chell for the events of Portal. As a result of several interactions and revelations, Chell once again pushes to escape Aperture Science Labs.

Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following.
 
 										The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game.
 										
 										The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively.
 										
 										 Product Features 
 										   Extensive single player:  Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story.
 										   Complete two-person co-op:  Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay.
 										   Advanced physics:  Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game.
 										   Original music. 
 										   Massive sequel:  The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. 
 										   Editing Tools:  Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Portal 2 continúa con esa fórmula ganadora consistente en una innovadora mecánica de juego, historia y música que condujeron al Portal original a ganar más de 70 galardones y lo convirtieron en un nuevo mito de la industria.
 
 										En el modo de un jugador de Portal 2 conoceremos a un nuevo elenco de personajes, gran cantidad de innovadores puzles y un número mucho mayor de enrevesadas salas de pruebas. Los jugadores podrán explorar zonas de Aperture Science Labs nunca vistas anteriormente y volverán a encontrarse a GLaDOS, ese compañero computerizado, y en ocasiones con tendencias asesinas, que los guio a lo largo del juego original.
 										
 										El modo cooperativo para dos jugadores tiene su propia campaña totalmente independiente, con una historia única, salas de pruebas y dos nuevos personajes con los que podremos jugar. Este nuevo modo obliga a los jugadores a reconsiderar todo lo que creían saber acerca de los portales. Para tener éxito no solo deberán trabajar codo con codo, sino que también tendrán que pensar de forma cooperativa.
 										
 										 Características principales 
 										   Amplio modo de un jugador:  Con una mecánica de juego de nueva generación y una historia increíblemente fascinante.
 										   Cooperativo para dos jugadores:  El modo multijugador dispone de su propia historia, personajes y mecánica de juego.
 										   Física avanzada:  Permite la creación de nuevos e interesantes desafíos para disfrutar de un juego mucho más largo pero no más difícil.
 										   Música original. 
 										   Una gran secuela:  El Portal original fue elegido «Juego del Año 2007» por más de 30 publicaciones de todo el mundo. 
 										   Herramientas de edición:  Se incluirán las herramientas de edición para Portal 2.

Portal 2 nous vient tout droit du jeu original et culte Portal, primé à plus de 70 reprises pour sa jouabilité, son scénario et sa musique.
 
 La partie solo de Portal 2 présente un ensemble de nouveaux personnages, de nouveaux éléments de casse-têtes et de nouvelles chambres de test plus vastes. Parcourez des pans inconnus des laboratoires d'Aperture Science et retrouvez GLaDOS, l'ordinateur maléfique du jeu original.
 
 Le mode coopératif à deux comprend une campagne autonome avec sa propre histoire, des chambres de test inédites et deux nouveaux personnages. Ce nouveau mode va remettre en question vos connaissances des portails. Non seulement vous devrez agir à deux, mais vous devrez aussi penser à deux.
 
  Caractéristiques du jeu 
    Mode solo :  une jouabilité nouvelle génération et une histoire captivante.
    Mode coopératif à deux :  un mode multijoueur avec sa propre histoire, deux nouveaux personnages et une nouvelle jouabilité.
    Modèles physiques avancés :  les nouveaux modèles permettent la création de nouvelles épreuves dans un environnement plus vaste et plus complexe.
    Bande-son originale. 
    Suite d'un jeu incontournable :  le jeu Portal original a été primé meilleur jeu de l'année 2007 par plus de 30 parutions dans le monde entier.
    Outils d'édition :  des outils pour créer vos propres chambres de test sont inclus.

Portal 2 verfeinert die preisgekrönte Mischung aus innovativem Spielgeschehen, Story und Musik, die dem Originalspiel Portal über 70 Auszeichnungen eingebracht hat und einen wahren Kult auslöste.
 
 										Der Einzelspielermodus von Portal 2 präsentiert einige neue und dynamische Charaktere, mehrere neue Puzzle-Elemente und eine Vielzahl neuer hinterhältiger Testkammern. Die Spieler erkunden bislang unbekannte Bereiche der Aperture Science Laboratorien, natürlich wieder mit der bisweilen mörderischen Hilfe von GLaDOS, dem Computerbegleiter aus dem Originalspiel.
 										
 										Der Zwei-Spieler-Koop-Modus bietet zudem eine vollkommen separate Kampagne mit einer einzigartigen Geschichte, weiteren Testkammern und zwei neuen Spielcharakteren. Dieser neue Modus zwingt Spieler dazu, alles zu überdenken, was sie bezüglich Portalen zu wissen glaubten. Erfolg setzt nicht nur kooperative Aktionen voraus, sondern auch kooperatives Denken.
 										
 										 Produkteigenschaften 
 										   Umfangreicher Einzelspielermodus:  Spielgeschehen der nächsten Generation mit einer fesselnden Geschichte.
 										   Kompletter Zwei-Spieler-Koop-Modus:  Mehrspielermodus mit eigener Geschichte, Charakteren und Spielmechanik.
 										   Fortschrittliche Physik:  Vollkommen neue und interessante Herausforderungen in einem viel intensiveren Spiel, ohne dabei den Schwierigkeitsgrad zu heben.
 										   Originalmusik. 
 										   Großartige Fortsetzung:  Das Originalspiel wurde 2007 weltweit von über 30 Publikationen zum Spiel des Jahres gekürt. 
 										   Editor:  Portal-2-Editor enthalten.

O Portal 2 é baseado na premiada fórmula de jogabilidade, história e música inovadoras que garantiu ao Portal original mais de 70 prémios e criou um culto entre os fãs.
 
 										A porção de um jogador de Portal 2 introduz um elenco de novas personagens dinâmicas, novos elementos de puzzle e um conjunto muito maior de tortuosas câmaras de teste. Os jogadores irão explorar áreas nunca antes vistas dos Laboratórios da Aperture Science e serão reunidos com GLaDOS, o computador ocasionalmente homicida que os guiou através do jogo original.
 										
 										O modo cooperativo de dois jogadores apresenta a sua própria campanha com uma história e câmaras de teste únicas e duas novas personagens jogáveis. Este novo modo força os jogadores a pôr em causa tudo aquilo que pensavam saber acerca dos portais. O sucesso irá não só requerer que os jogadores ajam cooperativamente, mas também que pensem cooperativamente.
 										
 										 Características do produto 
 										   Modo de um jogador extensivo:  Com jogabilidade de próxima geração e uma história fascinante.
 										   Modo cooperativo completo para duas pessoas:  Modo multijogador com a sua própria história, personagens e jogabilidade dedicadas.
 										   Física avançada:  Permite a criação de todo um novo conjunto de interessantes desafios, produzindo um jogo muito maior, sem aumentar a sua dificuldade.
 										   Música original. 
 										   Sequela massiva:  O Portal original foi nomeado Jogo do Ano em 2007 por mais de 30 publicações em todo o mundo. 
 										    Ferramentas de edição:  As ferramentas de edição do Portal 2 estão incluídas.

Portal 2 følger den prisvindende opskrift med nyskabende spilindhold, handling og musik, som gjorde, at det originale Portal vandt over 70 priser og fik en dedikeret tilhængerskare.
 
 										Singleplayerdelen af Portal 2 introducerer en række nye dynamiske karakterer, en stribe nye puzzleelementer og et meget større sæt af lumske testkamre. Spillere udforsker hidtil usete områder i Aperture Science Labs og møder endnu en gang GLaDOS, den til tider morderiske computerfølgesvend, som guidede dem igennem det originale spil.
 										
 										Spillets co-op-tilstand for to spillere har sin helt egen separate kampagne med en unik handling, testkamre og to nye spillerkarakterer. Den nye tilstand tvinger spillere til at tage alt, hvad de ved om portaler, op til fornyet overvejelse. Deres succes er afhængig af, at de ikke blot arbejder sammen, men også tænker sammen.
 										
 										 Produktet indeholder: 
 										   Omfattende singleplayer:  Med næstegenerationsgameplay og opslugende handling.
 										   Co-op for to spillere:  Multiplayerspil med sin egen dedikerede handling, karakterbesætning og eget gameplay.
 										   Avanceret fysik:  Gør det muligt at skabe et helt nyt udvalg af spændende udfordringer, som gør spillet meget større, men ikke sværere.
 										   Original musik. 
 										   En gigantisk efterfølger:  Det originale Portal blev kåret som årets spil i 2007 af over 30 publikationer verden over. 
 										   Redigeringsværktøjer:  Redigeringsværktøjerne fra Portal 2 følger med.

Portal 2 attinge dalla premiata formula di innovativa giocabilità, storia e musica che è valsa al primo Portal oltre 70 premi di settore e che ha generato un culto.
 
 										La porzione da giocatore singolo di Portal 2 introduce un cast di nuovi e coinvolgenti personaggi, una serie di enigmi originali e un'ancora più lunga sfilza di tortuose camere di test. I giocatori esploreranno aree dei Laboratori di Aperture Science mai viste prima e si riuniranno a GLaDOS, il computer saltuariamente omicida che li guidò attraverso il primo gioco.
 										
 										La modalità cooperativa a due giocatori offre una campagna unica dotata di una trama completamente separata da quella originale, con nuove camere di test e due nuovi personaggi giocabili. Questa nuova modalità obbliga i giocatori a riconsiderare tutto ciò che credevano di conoscere riguardo i portali. Il successo richiederà sia di agire che di pensare cooperativamente.
 										
 										 Caratteristiche del prodotto 
 										   Ampia modalità a giocatore singolo:  con giocabilità di nuova generazione e storia ferocemente avvincente.
 										   Completa modalità cooperativa a due giocatori:  modalità multigiocatore dotata di storia, personaggi e giocabiltà originali.
 										   Sistema fisico avanzato:  permette la creazione di una nuova serie di sfide, rendendo il gioco più vasto ma non più difficile.
 										   Musica originale. 
 										   Grandioso seguito:  il primo Portal è stato nominato gioco dell'anno del 2007 da oltre 30 periodici in tutto il mondo. 
 										   Strumenti di editing:  Portal 2 includerà gli strumenti di editing.

《传送门2》用创新的游戏内容、故事以及最初《传送门》那赢得超过 70 项以上业界奖项般的配乐打造出另一个大奖赢家的继承者。本作是一款以Source引擎制作的第一人称解密游戏，是2007年发售的同名游戏的续作。

《传送门2》的单人游戏部分带来充满活力的新角色、一大堆新鲜的解谜元素，以及更大、更加曲折的试验室。玩家将可以于前所未见的光圈科技实验室中探索，并且与在原游戏中引导你，偶尔想要把你杀掉的电脑陪伴者 GLaDOS 重逢。游戏共有总计九章的单人模式以及全新的五章合作通关（co-op）模式。新的道具将会挡住去路或帮助玩家前进，但最重要的依然是玩家手中的那把Portal Gun。

本游戏的双人合作模式将有其独立的战役内容，包含独特的故事、试验室，以及两名新的玩家角色。这项新的游戏模式让玩家必须重新思考所有他们在《传送门》中所了解到的事实。想要过关不只要一起行动，还必须一起思考。

game.brief: Sequel to the acclaimed Portal (2007), Portal 2 pits the protagonist of the original game, Chell, and her new robot friend, Wheatley, against more puzzles conceived by GLaDOS, an A.I. with the sole purpose of testing the Portal Gun's mechanics and taking revenge on Chell for the events of Portal. As a result of several interactions and revelations, Chell once again pushes to escape Aperture Science Labs.

game.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
game.description:
As Lara Croft races to save the world from a Maya apocalypse, she must become the Tomb Raider she is destined to be.

In the two months since Rise of the Tomb Raider, Lara Croft and her friend Jonah Maiava have dedicated themselves to stopping the activities of paramilitary organization Trinity. The two track a cell to Cozumel in Mexico that is led by Pedro Dominguez, the head of Trinity's High Council. Slipping inside nearby tombs being excavated by Trinity, Lara discovers a temple containing the Dagger of Chak Chel and references to a hidden city. Murals adorning the walls allude to the Silver Box of Ix Chel and warn of "the Cleansing", a Mayan apocalypse culminating in a permanent solar eclipse. Lara ignores the warnings and takes the Dagger to prevent Trinity from acquiring it. Dominguez catches her and reveals that by taking the Dagger, Lara has triggered the Cleansing. He takes the Dagger, intending to unite it with the Box to stop the Cleansing and use the power it grants him to remake the world in his image. Lara and Jonah escape a tsunami that destroys Cozumel and foreshadows the coming apocalypse.
Despite growing tensions between them over her actions, Lara and Jonah pursue Dominguez into the Amazon. Their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle during the second cataclysm—a massive storm—and the two find their way to Paititi, the hidden city shown in the murals. Exploring local tombs reveals that piercing the Box with the Dagger will grant the user the power of the god Kukulkan, which must be used to halt the Cleansing. Lara witnesses Trinity soldiers being slaughtered by strange humanoid monsters later identified as the Yaaxil, guardians of the Box. When Lara saves a boy named Etzli, she and Jonah are brought into Paititi by his mother Unuratu, queen of the city. Lara sees Dominguez is the leader of a cult dedicated to Kukulkan and Unuratu reveals he is her brother-in-law Amaru, who was taken by Trinity as a child and raised to complete the ritual and reshape the world in their image. Unuratu directs Lara to the Box, but Lara finds it is missing. Believing the cult already has the Box, Lara, and Unuratu attempt to steal it, but Unuratu is captured. Lara also encounters the Yaaxil and their leader Crimson Fire.
Lara infiltrates the cult's temple and overhears Amaru telling Unuratu that the Box was hidden by Andres Lopez, a missionary sent to Paititi by Trinity during the Spanish conquest of South America. Lara rescues Unuratu and realizes that Amaru does not fully understand the ritual; rather than merely imbuing Kukulkan's power, the ritual sacrifices it to stop the Cleansing. Unuratu is shot by Commander Rourke, Amaru's second in command. Before she dies, Unuratu implores Lara to complete the ritual but warns her not to let the Box influence her. Rourke attacks Lara and Jonah, who are separated as they leave Paititi to decipher the next clue. Thinking Jonah dead, Lara goes on a rampage that destroys an oil refinery and slaughters everyone there except Rourke, who escapes. She momentarily breaks down when she finds Jonah alive, but he manages to calm her, and they decipher the Box's location. Driven mad by the Box, Lopez established a mission near Paititi where he trained acolytes to complete the ritual. Lara and Jonah find a secret catacomb beneath the missiong leading to Lopez's tomb and the Box. Amaru finds them and forces Lara to surrender the Box. He admits that he ordered her father's death to prevent him from finding Paititi and revealing it to the world. Lara tries to persuade Amaru to use the ritual to benefit the world. He refuses, as the Cleansing will only affect Paititi. Amaru has used his position in Trinity to manipulate them into preventing it. He leaves Lara and Jonah to escape the third cataclysm, a massive earthquake that causes a landslide and destroys the mission.
Back in Paititi, Lara and Jonah help the newly-crowned Etzli lead an assault on an underground temple complex at Paititi's center. They plan to disrupt Amaru's ceremony while avoiding the fourth cataclysm, a volcanic eruption threatening Paititi. Lara is forced to go on alone when Trinity cuts off Etzli's forces. She encounters the Yaaxil and Crimson Fire, convincing them to help her stop Amaru. Lara takes on the symbolic role of Ix Chel while Crimson Fire becomes Chak Chel. While the Yaaxil kill Rourke and the Trinity High Council, Lara makes it to the temple summit. She fails to stop Amaru from piercing the Box and absorbing Kukulkan's power as an eclipse blocks the sun. Lara overpowers Amaru after a lengthy battle; accepting defeat, he transfers Kukulkan's power to Lara as he dies. True to Unuratu's warning, she is tempted to use the Box to revive her parents, but instead lets Crimson Fire symbolically stab her, sacrificing Kukulkan's spirit and stopping the Cleansing. In the aftermath, Unuratu is laid to rest, and Jonah decides to take a vacation. Lara stays in Paititi to help Etzli restore the city to its former glory. A post-credits scene shows Lara planning her next adventure at Croft Manor, acknowledging that her role is not to solve the world's mysteries, but to protect them.

  Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition out now for macOS and Linux.     
 
  About the Game    
 In Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition experience the final chapter of Lara’s origin as she is forged into the Tomb Raider she is destined to be. Combining the base game, all seven DLC challenge tombs, as well as all downloadable weapons, outfits, and skills, Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition is the ultimate way to experience Lara’s defining moment.
 
  Survive and Thrive In the Deadliest Place on Earth:  Master an unforgiving jungle setting in order to survive. Explore underwater environments filled with crevasses and deep tunnel systems.
 
  Become One With the Jungle:  Outgunned and outnumbered, Lara must use the jungle to her advantage. Strike suddenly and disappear like a jaguar, use mud as camouflage, and instill fear in enemies to sow chaos.
 
  Discover Dark and Brutal Tombs:  Tombs are more terrifying than ever before, requiring advanced traversal techniques to reach them, and once inside they are filled with deadly puzzles.
 
  Uncover Living History:  Discover a hidden city and explore the biggest hub space ever found in a Tomb Raider game.

  Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition ya está disponible para macOS y Linux.     
 
  Acerca del juego    
 En Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition, vive el capítulo final de la historia sobre el origen de Lara, en el que se convierte en la saqueadora de tumbas que está destinada a ser. Esta edición incluye el juego básico y siete tumbas de desafío de contenido descargable, así como armas, atuendos y habilidades descargables.
 
  Sobrevive en el lugar más mortal de la Tierra:  domina un entorno selvático inclemente. Explora entornos subacuáticos llenos de cavidades y sistemas de túneles.
 
  Sé uno con la selva:  en inferioridad numérica y mal equipada, Lara debe aprovechar la selva en su favor. Ataca por sorpresa y desaparece como un jaguar, camúflate en el barro y desata el pánico entre los enemigos para sembrar el caos.
 
  Descubre tumbas oscuras y despiadadas:  son más aterradoras que nunca, pues se requieren técnicas avanzadas para llegar a ellas y, una vez dentro, están repletas de puzles mortales.
 
  Desentierra la historia viva:  descubre la Ciudad Oculta y explora la mayor instalación jamás vista en un juego de Tomb Raider.

  Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition est désormais disponible sur macOS & Linux.     
 
  À propos du jeu    
 Prenez part au moment décisif où Lara Croft devient pilleuse de tombeaux. Dans Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition, vous découvrirez les derniers secrets des origines de Lara. Cette édition contient le jeu de base, les 7 défis tombeaux des DLC, ainsi que toutes les armes, tenues et compétences téléchargeables. Découvrez le passé de la plus célèbre des pilleuses de tombeaux dans cette édition ultime.
 
  Survivez et évoluez dans l'endroit le plus dangereux de la planète :  pour rester en vie, devenez experte d'une jungle sans merci. Partez à la découverte de milieux sous-marins regorgeant de crevasses et de tunnels.
 
  Ne faites qu'un avec la jungle :  désarmée et seule contre tous, Lara va devoir utiliser la jungle à son avantage. Comme le jaguar, frappez sans prévenir et disparaissez, utilisez la boue comme camouflage et insufflez la peur à vos ennemis pour semer le chao.
 
  Explorez de mystérieux tombeaux :  s'étendant aussi bien en hauteur qu'en largeur, les tombeaux sont désormais plus terrifiants que jamais, et une fois à l'intérieur, vous découvrirez qu'ils regorgent de casse-têtes mortels.
 
  Plongez au cœur de l'Histoire :  découvrez une cité perdue et parcourez le plus grand espace jamais conçu pour un jeu de la série.

  Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition ist jetzt für macOS & Linux erhältlich.     
 
  Infos zum Spiel    
 Erlebe in Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition das letzte Kapitel von Laras Origin-Story, in dem sich ihr Schicksal erfüllt und sie zum Tomb Raider wird. Die Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition enthält das Basisspiel, alle sieben DLC-Herausforderungsgräber sowie alle herunterladbaren Waffen, Outfits und Fähigkeiten – der ultimative Weg, um Laras entscheidenden Moment zu erleben.
 
  Überlebe und meistere den tödlichsten Ort auf Erden:  Überwinde einen gnadenlosen Dschungel, um zu überleben. Erkunde Welten unter Wasser, voller Höhlen und verzweigter Tunnelsysteme.
 
  Werde eins mit dem Dschungel:  Schlecht bewaffnet und in Unterzahl, muss Lara den Dschungel zu ihrem Vorteil nutzen. Schlage plötzlich zu und verschwinde sofort wieder, wie ein Jaguar, tarne dich mit Schlamm, und sorge für Angst und Chaos unter deinen Feinden.
 
  Entdecke dunkle und brutale Gräber:  Die Gräber sind schrecklicher als je zuvor und können nur mit komplexen Überwindungstechniken erreicht werden – und wenn du sie betreten hast, erwarten dich tödliche Rätsel.
 
  Entdecke lebendige Geschichte:  Finde eine verborgene Stadt, und erkunde die weitläufigste Spielwelt, die es je bei Tomb Raider gab.

  Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition è disponibile ora per macOS & Linux.     
 
  Informazioni sul gioco    
 Vivi il capitolo finale delle origini di Lara, che in Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition diventa la Tomb Raider che era destinata a essere. Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition include il gioco base, le sette tombe sfida dei DLC e tutte le armi, i completi e le abilità scaricabili, per vivere al meglio il capitolo più importante della storia di Lara.
 
  Affronta il luogo più letale della Terra:  domina l'inospitale giungla per sopravvivere. Esplora intricati ambienti subacquei e immergiti tra misteriosi crepacci irti di insidie e sistemi di cunicoli sotterranei.
 
  Diventa una cosa sola con la giungla:  in inferiorità numerica e con un limitato equipaggiamento, Lara deve sfruttare la giungla a suo vantaggio. Colpisci all'improvviso e sparisci come un giaguaro, usa il fango per mimetizzarti e instilla il terrore nei nemici per seminare il caos.
 
  Scopri tombe oscure e terrificanti:  raggiungere questi antichi sepolcri pieni di trappole letali sarà una sfida anche per l'esploratore più abile.
 
  La storia prende vita:  scopri una città segreta ed esplora il più grande ambiente interattivo mai visto nella serie di Tomb Raider.

Exploring local tombs reveals that piercing the Box with the Dagger will grant the user the power of the god Kukulkan, which must be used to halt the Cleansing. Lara witnesses Trinity soldiers being slaughtered by strange humanoid monsters later identified as the Yaaxil, guardians of the Box. When Lara saves a boy named Etzli, she and Jonah are brought into Paititi by his mother Unuratu, queen of the city. Lara sees Dominguez is the leader of a cult dedicated to Kukulkan and Unuratu reveals he is her brother-in-law Amaru, who was taken by Trinity as a child and raised to complete the ritual and reshape the world in their image. Unuratu directs Lara to the Box, but Lara finds it is missing. Believing the cult already has the Box, Lara, and Unuratu attempt to steal it, but Unuratu is captured. Lara also encounters the Yaaxil and their leader Crimson Fire.
Lara infiltrates the cult's temple and overhears Amaru telling Unuratu that the Box was hidden by Andres Lopez, a missionary sent to Paititi by Trinity during the Spanish conquest of South America. Lara rescues Unuratu and realizes that Amaru does not fully understand the ritual; rather than merely imbuing Kukulkan's power, the ritual sacrifices it to stop the Cleansing. Unuratu is shot by Commander Rourke, Amaru's second in command. Before she dies, Unuratu implores Lara to complete the ritual but warns her not to let the Box influence her. Rourke attacks Lara and Jonah, who are separated as they leave Paititi to decipher the next clue. Thinking Jonah dead, Lara goes on a rampage that destroys an oil refinery and slaughters everyone there except Rourke, who escapes. She momentarily breaks down when she finds Jonah alive, but he manages to calm her, and they decipher the Box's location. Driven mad by the Box, Lopez established a mission near Paititi where he trained acolytes to complete the ritual. Lara and Jonah find a secret catacomb beneath the missiong leading to Lopez's tomb and the Box. Amaru finds them and forces Lara to surrender the Box. He admits that he ordered her father's death to prevent him from finding Paititi and revealing it to the world. Lara tries to persuade Amaru to use the ritual to benefit the world. He refuses, as the Cleansing will only affect Paititi. Amaru has used his position in Trinity to manipulate them into preventing it. He leaves Lara and Jonah to escape the third cataclysm, a massive earthquake that causes a landslide and destroys the mission.
Back in Paititi, Lara and Jonah help the newly-crowned Etzli lead an assault on an underground temple complex at Paititi's center. They plan to disrupt Amaru's ceremony while avoiding the fourth cataclysm, a volcanic eruption threatening Paititi. Lara is forced to go on alone when Trinity cuts off Etzli's forces. She encounters the Yaaxil and Crimson Fire, convincing them to help her stop Amaru. Lara takes on the symbolic role of Ix Chel while Crimson Fire becomes Chak Chel. While the Yaaxil kill Rourke and the Trinity High Council, Lara makes it to the temple summit. She fails to stop Amaru from piercing the Box and absorbing Kukulkan's power as an eclipse blocks the sun. Lara overpowers Amaru after a lengthy battle; accepting defeat, he transfers Kukulkan's power to Lara as he dies. True to Unuratu's warning, she is tempted to use the Box to revive her parents, but instead lets Crimson Fire symbolically stab her, sacrificing Kukulkan's spirit and stopping the Cleansing. In the aftermath, Unuratu is laid to rest, and Jonah decides to take a vacation. Lara stays in Paititi to help Etzli restore the city to its former glory. A post-credits scene shows Lara planning her next adventure at Croft Manor, acknowledging that her role is not to solve the world's mysteries, but to protect them.

game.title: Vampire Survivors
game.description:
Mow thousands of night creatures and survive until dawn! Vampire Survivors is a gothic horror casual game with rogue-lite elements, where your choices can allow you to quickly snowball against the hundreds of monsters that get thrown at you.

Vampire Survivors is nominally set in rural Italy in 2021. Hordes of monsters summoned by the evil Bisconte Draculó (a villain inspired by Count Dracula) ravage the land, prompting the Belpaese family and other heroic survivors to take it upon themselves to hunt down and defeat Draculó. This quest takes them through monster-infested locales such as a cursed forest, a haunted library, an abandoned dairy plant, an ominous tower, and an otherworldly chapel, culminating in a battle against an Eldritch otherworldly being referred to as "The Directer". Despite the game's title, the characters do not fight any vampires in the story.

game.title: Detroit: Become Human
game.description:
Featuring world-renowned actors including Jesse Williams (Grey’s Anatomy), Clancy Brown (Carnivale), Lance Henriksen  (Aliens), Bryan Dechart (True Blood) and Valorie Curry (Twilight). 

WHAT MAKES US HUMAN?    
 
Detroit 2038. Technology has evolved to a point where human like androids are everywhere. They speak, move and behave like human beings, but they are only machines serving humans.

 Play three distinct androids and see a world at the brink of chaos – perhaps our future - through their eyes. Your very decisions will dramatically alter how the game’s intense, branching narrative plays out.
 
 You will face moral dilemmas and decide who lives or dies. With thousands of choices and dozens of possible endings, how will you affect the future of Detroit and humanity’s destiny?
 
     PLAY YOUR PART IN A GRIPPING NARRATIVE 
Enter a world where moral dilemmas and difficult decisions can turn android slaves into world-changing revolutionaries. Discover what it means to be human from the perspective of an outsider – and see the world through the eyes of a machine. 

THEIR LIVES, YOUR CHOICES  
Shape an ambitious branching narrative, where your decisions not only determine the fate of the three main characters, but that of the entire city of Detroit. How you control Kara, Connor and Markus can mean life or death – and if one of them pays the ultimate price, the story still continues… 

COUNTLESS PATHS, COUNTLESS ENDINGS  Every decision you make, no matter how minute, affects the outcome of the story. No playthrough will be exactly the same: replay again and again to discover a totally different conclusion. 

FULLY OPTIMIZED FOR PC  
Detroit: Become Human is brought to PC with stunning graphics, 4K resolution, 60 fps framerate and full integration of both mouse/keyboard and gamepad controls for the most complete Detroit: Become Human experience to date.

¡ Detroit: Become Human , el galardonado videojuego de  Quantic Dream , está finalmente disponible en Steam! Con la actuación de actores aclamados mundialmente como  Jesse Williams  (Anatomía de Grey),  Clancy Brown  (Carnivale),  Lance Henriksen  (Aliens),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) y  Valorie Curry  (Crepúsculo). ¿QUÉ NOS HACE HUMANOS?    
 Detroit, 2038. La tecnología ha evolucionado hasta tal punto que hay androides de apariencia humana en todas partes. Hablan, se mueven y se comportan como seres humanos, pero no son más que máquinas al servicio de los humanos.
 Maneja a tres androides distintos y contempla un mundo al borde del caos (¿quizás nuestro futuro?) a través de sus ojos. Tus decisiones afectarán drásticamente a la intensa trama ramificada del juego.
 Te enfrentarás a dilemas morales y decidirás quién vive y quién muere. Con miles de decisiones y docenas de posibles finales, ¿cómo afectarás al futuro de Detroit y el destino de la humanidad?
     OCUPA TU LUGAR EN UNA HISTORIA CAUTIVADORA Adéntrate en un mundo donde dilemas morales y difíciles decisiones pueden convertir a los esclavos androides en revolucionarios que cambiarán el mundo. Descubre lo que significa ser humano desde una perspectiva ajena y contempla el mundo con los ojos de una máquina. SUS VIDAS, TUS DECISIONES  Guía las ramificaciones de una historia ambiciosa en la que tus decisiones no solo determinarán el destino de los tres protagonistas, sino de toda la ciudad de Detroit. La forma en que controlas a Kara, Connor y Markus puede suponer su vida o su muerte; y si uno de ellos paga el precio final, la historia continuará... CAMINOS INCONTABLES, INCONTABLES FINALES  Cada decisión que tomes, por ínfima que parezca, afecta al resultado de la historia. Ninguna partida será exactamente igual: repite el juego una y otra vez para descubrir diferentes conclusiones. TOTALMENTE OPTIMIZADO PARA PC  Detroit: Become Human llega a PC con impresionantes gráficos, resolución en 4K, una tasa de fotogramas de 60 FPS e integración completa tanto con ratón y teclado como con mandos, para hacer de esta la experiencia de Detroit: Become Human más completa hasta la fecha.

Detroit: Become Human , la production récompensée de  Quantic Dream , est maintenant disponible sur Steam ! Avec des acteurs de renommée mondiale comme  Jesse Williams  (Grey's Anatomy),  Clancy Brown  (La Caravane de l'Étrange),  Lance Henriksen  (Aliens, le retour),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) et  Valorie Curry  (Twilight) QU'EST-CE QUI NOUS REND HUMAIN ?    
 Détroit, 2038. L'évolution de la technologie a créé un monde où les robots androïdes sont partout. Ils parlent, se déplacent et se comportent comme des humains, mais ce ne sont que des machines au service de ces derniers.
 À travers les yeux de trois androïdes, découvrez un monde au bord du chaos. Prenez des décisions, tout en sachant qu'elles auront un immense impact sur l'incroyable histoire du jeu et ses différentes intrigues.
 Vous serez confronté à des dilemmes et devrez décider qui va vivre... et qui doit mourir. Avec des milliers de choix et des dizaines de fins différentes, quelle influence allez-vous avoir sur le futur de Détroit et le destin de l'humanité ?
     JOUEZ UN RÔLE DANS UNE INTRIGUE SURPRENANTE Entrez dans un monde où les dilemmes moraux et les décisions difficiles peuvent transformer des esclaves androïdes en révolutionnaires. Découvrez ce qui vous rend humain, du point de vue de quelqu'un qui ne l'est pas. Voyez le monde à travers les yeux d'un robot. VOS CHOIX, LEURS DESTINS  Découvrez une intrigue fascinante, dans laquelle vos décisions déterminent non seulement le destin des trois personnages principaux, mais également celui de la ville de Détroit tout entière. La vie de Kara, Connor et Markus dépend de la façon dont vous les contrôlez, et si l'un d'entre eux périt... l'histoire continue. DES CHOIX ET DES FINS À L'INFINI  Chaque décision, même la plus infime, affecte le déroulement de l'histoire. Chaque partie est différente : vous pouvez rejouer encore et encore pour découvrir d'autres possibilités. OPTIMISÉ POUR PC  Detroit: Become Human arrive maintenant sur PC avec des graphismes incroyables, une résolution 4K, un débit 60 FPS et une intégration complète des commandes souris/clavier ou gamepad, pour vous offrir l'expérience de jeu la plus complète à ce jour.

Detroit: Become Human[/b] - die preisgekrönte Videospielproduktion von  Quantic Dream  ist endlich auf Steam erhältlich! Mit weltberühmten Schauspielern wie  Jesse Williams  (Grey's Anatomy),  Clancy Brown  (Carnivale),  Lance Henriksen  (Aliens),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) und  Valorie Curry  (Twilight). WAS MACHT UNS ZU MENSCHEN?    
 Detroit 2038. Die Technologie hat sich so weit entwickelt, dass menschenähnliche Androiden überall zu finden sind. Sie sprechen, bewegen und verhalten sich wie Menschen, aber sie sind nur Maschinen, die dem Menschen dienen.
 Spielen Sie als drei verschiedene Androiden und sehen Sie durch ihre Augen eine Welt am Rande des Chaos, die vielleicht unsere Zukunft sein könnte. Ihre gezielten Entscheidungen werden den Ablauf der intensiven, verzweigten Story des Spiels drastisch verändern.
 Sie stehen vor einem moralischen Dilemma und entscheiden, wer lebt oder stirbt. Wie werden Sie bei Tausenden von Wahlmöglichkeiten und Dutzenden möglicher Enden die Zukunft Detroits und das Schicksal der Menschheit beeinflussen?
     SPIELEN SIE IHREN TEIL IN EINER PACKENDEN STORY Betreten Sie in eine Welt, in der moralische Dilemmata und schwierige Entscheidungen androide Sklaven in weltbewegende Revolutionäre verwandeln können. Entdecken Sie aus der Perspektive eines Außenstehenden, was es bedeutet, ein Mensch zu sein – und sehen Sie die Welt mit den Augen einer Maschine. IHR LEBEN, IHRE WAHL  Gestalten Sie eine ambitionierte und verwobene Story, in der Ihre Entscheidungen nicht nur das Schicksal der drei Hauptfiguren, sondern das der gesamten Stadt Detroit bestimmen. Wie Sie Kara, Connor und Markus kontrollieren, kann Leben oder Tod bedeuten – und wenn einer der Charaktere stirbt, geht die Geschichte trotzdem weiter ... UNZÄHLIGE WEGE, ZAHLLOSE ENDEN  Jede Entscheidung, die Sie treffen, wie klein sie auch sein mag, beeinflusst das Ende der Geschichte. Kein Durchspielen gleicht dem anderen: Spielen Sie immer und immer wieder, um ein völlig anderes Ende zu erleben. VOLLSTÄNDIG OPTIMIERT FÜR PC  Detroit: Become Human erscheint auf dem PC mit atemberaubender Grafik, 4K-Auflösung, 60 fps Framerate und voller Integration für Maus/Tastatur und Gamepad für das bis dato vollständigste Erlebnis von Detroit: Become Human.

Detroit: Become Human , o jogo premiado produzido pela  Quantic Dream , está finalmente disponível no Steam! Com atores mundialmente famosos, incluindo  Jesse Williams  (Anatomia de Grey),  Clancy Brown  (Carnivale),  Lance Henriksen  (Aliens),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) e  Valorie Curry  (Crepúsculo). O QUE É QUE NOS TORNA HUMANOS?    
 Detroit 2038. A tecnologia evoluiu até um ponto onde há androides idênticos a humanos por toda a parte. Eles falam, movem-se e comportam-se como seres humanos, mas são apenas máquinas ao serviço deles.
 Joga como três androides diferentes e vê um mundo à beira do caos - quiçá alusivo ao nosso futuro - através da sua perspetiva. As tuas decisões vão alterar significativamente o desenrolar da intensa narrativa ramificada do jogo.
 Vais enfrentar dilemas morais e decidir quem vive ou morre. Com milhares de escolhas e dezenas de finais possíveis, como é que irás afetar o futuro de Detroit e o destino da humanidade?
     DESEMPENHA O TEU PAPEL NUMA NARRATIVA EMOCIONANTE Entra num mundo onde dilemas morais e decisões difíceis podem transformar escravos androides em revolucionários que podem mudar o mundo. Descobre o que significa ser humano da perspetiva de um estranho - e vê o mundo através dos olhos de uma máquina. AS SUAS VIDAS, AS TUAS ESCOLHAS  Dá forma a uma narrativa ramificada ambiciosa, onde as tuas decisões não só determinam o destino dos três personagens principais, mas também o de toda a cidade de Detroit. Como controlas a Kara, o Connor e o Markus pode levar à vida ou à morte - e se um deles pagar o derradeiro preço, a história continua... INÚMEROS CAMINHOS, INÚMEROS FINAIS  Todas as decisões que tomas, não importa o quão minúsculas, afetam o desenrolar da narrativa. Nenhum jogo será exatamente igual: joga várias vezes para descobrir uma conclusão totalmente diferente. COMPLETAMENTE OTIMIZADO PARA PC  Detroit: Become Human chega aos PCs com gráficos deslumbrantes, resolução 4K de 60 fotogramas por segundo e integração completa de controlos de rato/teclado ou comando para a experiência mais completa de sempre de Detroit: Become Human.

Detroit: Become Human , den prisvindende videospilsproduktion fra  Quantic Dream , er endelig tilgængelig på Steam! Verdensberømte skuespillere medvirker, herunder  Jesse Williams  (Grey’s Anatomy),  Clancy Brown  (Carnivale),  Lance Henriksen  (Aliens),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) og  Valorie Curry  (Twilight). HVAD GØR OS TIL MENNESKER?    
 Detroit 2038. Teknologien har udviklet sig til et punkt, hvor menneskelignende androider er overalt. De taler, bevæger og opfører sig som mennesker, men de er kun maskiner, der tjener mennesker.
 Spil som tre forskellige androider, og oplev en verden på randen af kaos - måske vores fremtid - gennem deres øjne. Dine beslutninger vil på dramatisk vis ændre, hvordan spillets intense, komplekse fortælling udfolder sig.
 Du kommer til at stå over for moralske dilemmaer og skal beslutte, hvem der lever eller dør. Hvordan vil du påvirke Detroits fremtid og menneskehedens skæbne, når du bliver stillet overfor tusindvis af valg og snesevis af mulige slutninger?
     SPIL DIN ROLLE I EN MEDRIVENDE FORTÆLLING Træd ind i en verden, hvor moralske dilemmaer og vanskelige beslutninger kan gøre androide-slaver til revolutionære, der ændrer verden. Oplev, hvad det betyder at være menneske fra en udenforståendes perspektiv - og se verden gennem en maskines øjne. DERES LIV, DINE VALG  Skab en ambitiøs, kompleks fortælling, hvor dine beslutninger ikke kun bestemmer de tre hovedpersoners skæbne, men også hele Detroits skæbne. Hvordan du styrer Kara, Connor og Markus kan betyde liv eller død - og hvis en af dem betaler den ultimative pris, fortsætter historien stadig… UTALLIGE MULIGHEDER, UTALLIGE SLUTNINGER  Hver beslutning, du træffer, uanset hvor ubetydelig den er, påvirker resultatet af historien. Intet spil er nøjagtigt det samme: spil igen og igen for at opdage en helt anden konklusion. FULDT OPTIMERET TIL PC  Detroit: Become Human fås til pc med enestående grafik, 4K-opløsning, billedhastighed på 60 fps og fuld integration af både mus/tastatur- og gamepad-kontroller for den mest komplette Detroit: Become Human-oplevelse til dato.

Detroit: Become Human , il pluripremiato videogioco prodotto da  Quantic Dream , è finalmente disponibile su Steam! E ha un cast di eccezione che include  Jesse Williams  (Grey’s Anatomy),  Clancy Brown  (Carnivàle),  Lance Henriksen  (Alien),  Bryan Dechart  (True Blood) e  Valorie Curry  (Twilight). COS'È CHE CI RENDE UMANI?    
 Detroit, 2038. La tecnologia si è evoluta a tal punto che gli androidi umanoidi sono ovunque. Parlano, si muovono e si comportano come persone, ma sono solo macchine al servizio degli esseri umani.
 Controlla tre diversi androidi e osserva coi loro occhi un mondo a un passo dal caos... forse, il nostro stesso futuro. Saranno le tue decisioni ad alterare il corso degli eventi e a governare la storia attraverso le complesse ramificazioni della trama.
 Affronterai dilemmi morali e stabilirai chi vive e chi muore. Con migliaia di scelte e decine di finali possibili, come influirai sul futuro di Detroit e il destino dell'umanità?
     PRENDI PARTE A UNA STORIA COINVOLGENTE Entra in un universo in cui dilemmi morali e decisioni difficili possono trasformare degli schiavi androidi in rivoluzionari destinati a cambiare il mondo. Scopri cosa significa essere umani da una prospettiva esterna e guarda il mondo attraverso gli occhi di una macchina. LE LORO VITE, LE TUE SCELTE  Fatti strada attraverso un'ambiziosa struttura narrativa ramificata, in cui le tue decisioni non determinano solo il fato dei tre protagonisti, ma di tutta la città di Detroit. Il modo in cui controllerai Kara, Connor e Markus farà la differenza tra la vita e la morte. E se uno di loro la pagherà a caro prezzo, la storia andrà comunque avanti... INFINITE POSSIBILITÀ, INFINITI FINALI  Ogni scelta che fai, per quanto piccola, influenza l'esito della storia. Nessuna partita sarà esattamente uguale a un'altra: gioca più e più volte per arrivare a conclusioni totalmente differenti. OTTIMIZZATO PER PC  Detroit: Become Human ha una straordinaria grafica con risoluzione in 4K, frame rate di 60 FPS e integrazione completa di mouse/tastiera e gamepad per immergersi totalmente nell'esperienza di Detroit: Become Human.

game.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
game.description:
Trained from early childhood and mutated to gain superhuman skills, strength, and reflexes, witchers are a counterbalance to the monster-infested world in which they live.

• Gruesomely destroy foes as a professional monster hunter armed with a range of upgradeable weapons, mutating potions, and combat magic.
• Hunt down a wide variety of exotic monsters, from savage beasts prowling mountain passes to cunning supernatural predators lurking in the shadowy back alleys of densely populated cities.
• Invest your rewards to upgrade your weaponry and buy custom armor, or spend them on horse races, card games, fist fighting, and other pleasures life brings.
  
Built for endless adventure, the massive open world of The Witcher sets new standards in terms of size, depth, and complexity.

• Traverse a fantastical open world: explore forgotten ruins, caves, and shipwrecks, trade with merchants and dwarven smiths in cities, and hunt across the open plains, mountains, and seas.
• Deal with treasonous generals, devious witches, and corrupt royalty to provide dark and dangerous services.
• Make choices that go beyond good & evil, and face their far-reaching consequences.
  
Take on the most important contract of your life: to track down the child of prophecy, the key to saving or destroying this world.

• In times of war, chase down the child of prophecy, a living weapon foretold by ancient elven legends.
• Struggle against ferocious rulers, spirits of the wilds, and even a threat from beyond the veil – all hell-bent on controlling this world.
• Define your destiny in a world that may not be worth saving.

DISCOVER THE STORY BEFORE THE WITCHER IV    
 
 
  About the Game  One of the most acclaimed RPGs of all time. Now ready for a new generation. 
   
  You are Geralt of Rivia, mercenary monster slayer. Before you stands a war-torn, monster-infested continent you can explore at will. Your current contract? Tracking down Ciri — the Child of Prophecy, a living weapon that can alter the shape of the world.
  
  Updated to the latest version, The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt comes with new features and items, including a built-in Photo Mode, swords, armor, and alternate outfits inspired by The Witcher Netflix series — and more!
  
   
  Behold the dark fantasy world of the Continent like never before! This edition of The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt has been enhanced with numerous visual and technical improvements, including vastly improved level of detail, a range of community created and newly developed mods for the game, real-time ray tracing, and more — all implemented with the power of modern PCs in mind.
  
   
  Trained from early childhood and mutated to gain superhuman skills, strength, and reflexes, witchers are a counterbalance to the monster-infested world in which they live.
  • Gruesomely destroy foes as a professional monster hunter armed with a range of upgradeable weapons, mutating potions, and combat magic.
  • Hunt down a wide variety of exotic monsters, from savage beasts prowling mountain passes to cunning supernatural predators lurking in the shadowy back alleys of densely populated cities.
  • Invest your rewards to upgrade your weaponry and buy custom armor, or spend them on horse races, card games, fist fighting, and other pleasures life brings.
  
   
  Built for endless adventure, the massive open world of The Witcher sets new standards in terms of size, depth, and complexity.
  • Traverse a fantastical open world: explore forgotten ruins, caves, and shipwrecks, trade with merchants and dwarven smiths in cities, and hunt across the open plains, mountains, and seas.
  • Deal with treasonous generals, devious witches, and corrupt royalty to provide dark and dangerous services.
  • Make choices that go beyond good & evil, and face their far-reaching consequences.
  
   
  Take on the most important contract of your life: to track down the child of prophecy, the key to saving or destroying this world.
  • In times of war, chase down the child of prophecy, a living weapon foretold by ancient elven legends.
  • Struggle against ferocious rulers, spirits of the wilds, and even a threat from beyond the veil – all hell-bent on controlling this world.
  • Define your destiny in a world that may not be worth saving.

《巫师3：狂猎》将是三部曲系列的最后一作，故事将有宏大的最后结局，但并非《巫师》系列的最终作。本作采用最新的REDengine3引擎制作，玩家可以在无缝的世界里任意探索，采用非线性剧情的设定，整体规模是前作的30倍。

《巫师3：狂猎》是一款由波兰游戏工作室CD Projekt RED开发并发行的开放世界动作角色扮演游戏，于2013年2月公布。游戏于2015年5月19日在Microsoft Windows、PlayStation 4和Xbox One平台发布，这也是首款在PlayStation平台发布的巫师系列游戏。

本作是巫师系列的第三部作品，同样改编自波兰奇幻小说作家安杰伊·萨普科夫斯基的同名系列小说（中译《猎魔人》），但剧情发生在小说之后。游戏在商业上取得了成功并受到了广泛的赞誉，在六周内销量超过600万，亦获得2015年游戏大奖的最佳年度游戏，以及最佳角色扮演游戏。

本作是一款情节驱动的开放世界角色扮演游戏。故事发生在一个令人目眩神迷的奇幻宇宙里，玩家做出的每一个选择都意义重大，同时也要面对影响深远的后果。在《巫师》这个广袤的开放世界中，您可以尽情探索商业都市、海盗岛屿、危险的山隘和被遗忘的洞窟。而随着北方领域战乱四起，您接下了此生最为重大的一笔委托：找到预言之子，一件足以改变世界面貌的活生生的武器。

◇ 扮演一名训练有素，收钱办事的怪物杀手
猎魔人身处的世界怪物横行。作为一支制衡力量，他们自小接受训练，通过变异来获得超人类的战斗技巧、力量和反应。
扮演一名职业怪物杀手，装备一系列可以升级的武器、变种魔药和战斗法术，无情地把对手大卸八块。
凶残的野兽徘徊于山间，狡猾的灵异掠食者潜伏在人烟稠密的城镇暗处，而您则要捕杀这些各色的奇异怪物。
把您赚取的奖赏用来升级武器，购买订制的盔甲，或者花在赛马、打牌、拳击，还有其它的夜间娱乐生活上。

◇ 探索道德沦丧的开放式奇幻世界
巫师宏大的开放世界为玩家带来无尽的冒险，并且在规模、深度和复杂性等方面树立了新的标准。
遍历奇幻的开放世界：探索被遗忘的废墟、洞穴和沉船，与城市里的商人和矮人工匠做买卖，在开阔的平原、山地和海洋上进行狩猎。
与谋反的将领、阴险的女巫还有腐败的皇室打交道，替他们去完成见不得光的危险勾当。
做出超越善恶的选择，直面影响深远的后果。

◇ 追寻预言之子
接下最为重要的一笔委托，追寻预言之子。那是一个可以拯救或是摧毁这个世界的关键。
根据古代精灵的预言，预言之子强大无比，是一件活生生的武器。而您则要在纷飞的战火中找到对方的下落。
和一心想要控制这个世界的残暴统治者、野外的精怪，乃至于来自来世的威胁斗智斗勇。
在这个或许并不值得拯救的世界里，左右自己的命运。

◇ 次世代机能的全面发挥
专为次世代硬件量身打造的 REDengine 3，把《巫师》的逼真奇幻世界渲染得细腻生动。
动态的天气系统和日夜循环，将会改变城镇居民以及野外怪兽的行为模式。
通过主线和支线的丰富剧情选择，玩家可以通过前所未有的方式，影响这个宏大的开放世界。

The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is an open-world action role-playing game developed by CD Projekt Red.

Set in a dark fantasy world, the game follows Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter searching for his adopted daughter, Ciri, while navigating political conflicts and supernatural threats. Gameplay features exploration, combat, character progression, and branching narratives shaped by player choices. Widely acclaimed for its writing, world-building, and depth, it is considered one of the most influential RPGs of its generation.

The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt concludes the story of the witcher Geralt of Rivia, the series' protagonist, whose story to date has been covered in the previous installments. Geralt's new mission comes in dark times as the mysterious and otherworldly army known as the Wild Hunt invades the Northern Kingdoms, leaving only blood soaked earth and fiery ruin in its wake; and it seems the Witcher is the key to stopping their cataclysmic rampage.

• Gruesomely destroy foes as a professional monster hunter armed with a range of upgradeable weapons, mutating potions, and combat magic.

Built for endless adventure, the massive open world of The Witcher sets new standards in terms of size, depth, and complexity.

• Traverse a fantastical open world: explore forgotten ruins, caves, and shipwrecks, trade with merchants and dwarven smiths in cities, and hunt across the open plains, mountains, and seas.
• Deal with treasonous generals, devious witches, and corrupt royalty to provide dark and dangerous services.
• Make choices that go beyond good & evil, and face their far-reaching consequences.

• In times of war, chase down the child of prophecy, a living weapon foretold by ancient elven legends.
• Struggle against ferocious rulers, spirits of the wilds, and even a threat from beyond the veil – all hell-bent on controlling this world.
• Define your destiny in a world that may not be worth saving.

game.title: Broforce
game.description: When evil threatens the world, the world calls on Broforce - an under-funded, over-powered paramilitary organization dealing exclusively in excessive force. Brace your loins with up to four players to run ‘n’ gun as dozens of different bros and eliminate the opposing terrorist forces that threaten our way of life. Unleash scores of unique weapons and set off incredible chain reactions of fire, napalm, and limbs in the name of freedom.

localized_description.text: When evil threatens the world, the world calls on Broforce - an under-funded, over-powered paramilitary organization dealing exclusively in excessive force. Brace your loins with up to four players to run ‘n’ gun as dozens of different bros and eliminate the opposing terrorist forces that threaten our way of life. Unleash scores of unique weapons and set off incredible chain reactions of fire, napalm, and limbs in the name of freedom.

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 《Broforce Forever》是2015年度最佳爱国游戏众所期待的免费更新，曾因莫须有罪名而无法投入热爱自由的玩家手中，现在则准时突破最高戒备的封锁，准备以大量肯塔基炸鸡式的腥风血雨迎战邪恶势力。
 
 本次最终更新将战役体验加以强化扩充，并加入新解锁内容、六位新登场的终极爱国兄弟、四个传播民主的新挑战关卡，还有军事力量的究极展现：修复错误！
 
 回归玩家享受本更新的最佳方式是重新玩一遍战役，然后再玩一遍，玩到天荒地老。 新兄弟报到 驾驭Seth Brondle（赛夫·搏朗斗）充满算计的高智商以及会吐酸的魅力，挥舞Xebro（锡搏）的飞空环刃，跟着弹奏动人音乐的扰乱分子Desperabro（亡命兄弟）用榴弹让恐怖主义长眠，或是成为怪物的恶梦：投掷木桩、净化不洁存在、自我复活的青少年Slayer（杀手）！
 
 如果狙击比较符合你的风格，知名的昆虫猎人Burt Brommer（勃尔特·勃罗默）能用可靠的步枪准确解放目标，Demolition Bro（爆破兄弟）的冰冻榴弹则能把恶人送回他们该去的地方，加以冰封。 新坏蛋登场 面对企图破坏自由的恶人时，兄弟才会成为战力。《Broforce Forever》的恐怖分子如今更加坚定，决心要摧毁民主体制。Motorbike Maniacs（摩托车狂徒）会想尽办法撞倒玩家，定点机枪、带刺铁丝、沙包、满载火箭弹的飞船则会彼此合作，让兄弟们每次前往占领地区出任务变得异常艰难。 新挑战降临 想找更大型战役的兄弟可以进入Muscle Temples（肌肉神殿），在这些新的挑战关卡中秀秀肌肉。每场战役中，各位印第安纳兄斯都必须闯过危险的神殿，克服新的威胁度、特定类型的敌人、各种危险。成功后即可解锁四项秀肌肉新能力的其中一种，让任何兄弟随时随地使用，就像行使自由一样。
 
  关于游戏 当邪恶威胁世界时,世界就会呼唤 Broforce,-一个资金不足但能力过硬、专门处理极端组织的准军事组织。 挺直腰板,与其他几十个兄弟一样奔跑、开火,消灭威胁到我们生活方式的恐怖主义。 释放数十种独特的武器,以自由之名掀起一系列对于火、烧夷弹、肢体等不可思议的连锁反应。 主要特色   兄贵力量：与其他几十个拥有特殊武器和独特攻击技巧的兄弟一样让世界感到对你的震惊和敬畏，在世界各地传播自由的福音。
   兄贵合作&死亡竞赛：在合作模式中与多达四位玩家一起对抗恐怖主义，或是断绝兄贵关系，在多种夸张的竞争模式中相互对峙。
   加入其他兄贵，在地区爆炸和大规模混乱的压力下穿越这些限时独特的攻击关卡。
   可破坏的地形提供了一系列战略选项，而正义爆炸红桶™简直可以一击扫清战场。
   运用强大的关卡编辑器，设计你自己的毁灭乐园，分享到网上成为其他兄贵嫉妒的焦点。浏览数十个用户创建的关卡，完成这些关卡并评估它们的兄贵力。

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 《Broforce Forever》是2015年度最佳愛國遊戲眾所期待的免費更新，曾因莫須有罪名而無法投入熱愛自由的玩家手中，現在則準時突破最高戒備的封鎖，準備以大量肯塔基酥炸式腥風血雨迎戰邪惡勢力。
 
 本次最終更新將戰役體驗加以強化擴充，並加入新解鎖內容、六位新登場的終極愛國兄弟、四個傳播民主的新挑戰關卡，還有軍事力量的究極展現：修復錯誤！
 
 回歸玩家享受本更新的最佳方式是重新玩一遍戰役，然後再玩一遍，玩到天荒地老。 新兄弟報到 駕馭Seth Brondle（賽夫．搏朗鬥）充滿算計的高智商以及會吐酸的魅力，揮舞Xebro（錫搏）的飛空環刃，跟著彈奏動人音樂的擾亂分子Desperabro（亡命兄弟）用榴彈讓恐怖主義長眠，或是成為怪物的惡夢：投擲木樁、淨化不潔存在、自我復活的青少年Slayer（殺手）！
 
 如果狙擊比較符合你的風格，知名的昆蟲獵人Burt Brommer（搏特．搏肉莫）能用可靠的步槍讓目標準確獲得解脫，Demolition Bro（爆破兄弟）的冰凍榴彈則能把惡人送回他們該去的地方，加以冰封。 新壞蛋登場 面對企圖破壞自由的惡人時，兄弟才會成為戰力。《Broforce Forever》的恐怖分子如今更加堅定，決心要摧毀民主體制。Motorbike Maniacs（摩托車狂徒）會想盡辦法撞倒玩家，定點機槍、帶刺鐵絲、沙包、滿載火箭彈的飛船則會彼此合作，讓兄弟們每次前往占領地區出任務變得異常艱難。 新挑戰降臨 想找更大型戰役的兄弟可以進入Muscle Temples（肌肉神殿），在這些新的挑戰關卡中秀秀肌肉。每場戰役中，各位印第安納．兄斯都必須闖過危險的神殿，克服新的威脅度、特定類型的敵人、各種危險。成功後即可解鎖四項秀肌肉新能力的其中一種，讓任何兄弟隨時隨地使用，就像行使自由一樣。
 
  關於此遊戲 當邪惡威脅世界時，世界就會呼喚Broforce，-一個資金不足但能力過硬、專門處理極端組織的准軍事組織。挺直腰板，與其他幾十個兄弟一樣奔跑、開火，消滅威脅到我們生活方式的恐怖主義。釋放數十種獨特的武器，以自由之名掀起一系列對於火、燒夷彈、肢體等不可思議的連鎖反應。 主要特色   與其他幾十個擁有特殊武器和獨特攻擊技巧的兄弟一樣讓世界感到對你的震驚和敬畏，在世界各地傳播自由的福音。
   在合作模式中與多達四位玩家一起對抗恐怖主義，或是斷絕兄貴關系，在多種誇張的競爭模式中相互對峙。
   入其他兄貴，在地區爆炸和大規模混亂的壓力下穿越這些限時獨特的攻擊關卡。
   可破壞的地形提供了一系列戰略選項，而正義爆炸紅桶™簡直可以一擊掃清戰場。
   運用強大的關卡編輯器，設計你自己的毀滅樂園，分享到網上成為其他兄貴嫉妒的焦點。瀏覽數十個用戶創建的關卡，完成這些關卡並評估它們的兄貴力。

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, the long-awaited free update to 2015’s most patriotic video game, held back from freedom-loving gamers for a crime it didn’t commit, has promptly escaped from a maximum security stockade and unleashes a megaton of Kentucky-fried carnage into the face of evil.
 
 The final update offers an improved and expanded campaign with new unlocks, along with six new ultra-patriotic bros, four new democracy-spreading challenge levels, and the ultimate expression of military might – bug fixes!
 
 The best way for a returning player to enjoy this is to play through the entire campaign again. And again. Forever. NEW BROS Harness the calculating intelligence and acid-spitting allure of Seth Brondle, wield Xebro’s flying Chakram, serenade (and grenade) terrorism with the flamenco firebrand Desperabro, or become the thing monsters have nightmares about, a stake throwing, unholy purging, self-resurrecting teenage Slayer!
 
 If sniping is more your style, famed bug hunter Bro Gummer brings pinpoint liberation with his trusty rifle, while Demolition Bro’s Freeze Grenades put evildoers right back where they belong… ON ICE. NEW BADDIES A Bro only becomes a force when confronted with those who seek to destroy their freedoms, and in Broforce Forever, the terrorists are even more determined to delete democracy. Motorbike Maniacs will try to run you down, while machine gun placements, barbed wire, sandbags and bazooka-laden blimps conspire to make each visit to occupied territory a very, very bad day at the broffice. NEW CHALLENGES Bros in search of even bigger battles can flex their muscles in new challenge levels known as Muscle Temples. Each campaign tasks Indiana Brones with navigating a perilous temple that features a new Threat Level and specific enemy types and hazards. Succeed and unlock one of four new flexes that can be deployed by any Bro, any time, any place. Just like freedom.
 
  About the Game When evil threatens the world, the world calls on Broforce - an under-funded, over-powered paramilitary organization dealing exclusively in excessive force. Brace your loins with up to four players to run ‘n’ gun as dozens of different bros and eliminate the opposing terrorist forces that threaten our way of life. Unleash scores of unique weapons and set off incredible chain reactions of fire, napalm, and limbs in the name of freedom.
 
     The Broforce Deliver your own brand of shock and awe with dozens of bros each with their own unique weaponry and special attacks designed to dispatch freedom across the world. Bro-Op & Deathmatch Battle terrorism with up to four players in cooperative mode or sever ties with your bros and face each other in several bombastic competitive modes. Explosion Run Join up with other bros to tackle these unique time attack levels under the pressure of exploding terrains and mass chaos. Fully Destructible Everything Destructible terrain opens up a slew of strategic options while the abundance of Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ can literally level the playing field with one shot. Level Editor Design your own playground of destruction with a robust level editor and become the envy of all the other bros by sharing them online. Browse through scores of custom user created levels and complete them to rate their Bro-ness.

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, la esperada actualización gratuita del juego más patriota de 2015, fue ocultada por un delito que no había cometido. No tardó en fugarse de la prisión en la que se encontraba recluida para soltarle un megatón de libertad en toda la cara a las fuerzas del mal.
 
 La actualización final ofrece una campaña ampliada y mejorada con nuevo contenido que desbloquear, además de seis nuevos bros ultrapatrióticos, cuatro nuevos niveles de desafío en los que esparcir la democracia y la máxima expresión del poderío militar: ¡correcciones de errores!
 
 Para un jugador veterano, la mejor forma de disfrutar de todo esto es volver a jugar toda la campaña otra vez. Y otra. Y así eternamente. NUEVOS BROS Aprovecha la calculadora inteligencia y la seductora capacidad de escupir ácido de Seth Brondle, lanza el chakram volador de Xebro, cántales a los terroristas mientras los masacras con el mariachi asesino Desperabro o conviértete en la peor pesadilla de los monstruos, ¡una cazadora lanzaestacas adolescente que purga a los impíos y se autorresucita!
 
 Si lo tuyo es el largo alcance, el famoso cazador de bichos Burt Brommer imparte libertad con precisión gracias a su fiel fusil, mientras que las granadas congeladoras de Demolition Bro dejarán a los malos como se merecen... HELADOS. NUEVOS MALOS Un bro solo es digno de ese título cuando se enfrenta a quienes pretenden destruir la libertad, y en Broforce Forever los terroristas están más decididos que nunca a acabar con la democracia. Maniacos motorizados intentarán atropellarte, mientras que los puestos de ametralladoras, el alambre de espino, los sacos de arena y los dirigibles repletos de bazucas harán que cada excursión por territorio ocupado sea peor que un arma que se queda sin munición. NUEVOS DESAFÍOS Los bros que busquen batallas aún más grandes pueden exhibir sus músculos en los nuevos niveles de desafío conocidos como Templos del músculo. En cada campaña, Indiana Brones deberá atravesar un peligroso templo que cuenta con un nuevo nivel de amenaza y tipos específicos de enemigos y peligros. Si tienes éxito, desbloquearás una de las cuatro nuevas flexiones de músculos, que todos los bros podrán usar en cualquier momento y lugar en nombre de la libertad.
 
  Acerca del juego Cuando el mal amenaza al mundo, el mundo llama a Broforce, una organización paramilitar tan musculada como mal financiada que se especializa en el uso excesivo de la fuerza. Reparte libertad con hasta cuatro jugadores mientras corres y disparas con decenas de bros diferentes y elimina a los terroristas que ponen en peligro nuestra forma de vida. Emplea montones de armas únicas y provoca increíbles reacciones en cadena repletas de fuego, napalm y extremidades en nombre de la libertad. Broforce Arrasa con todo a tu manera con decenas de bros, cada uno con armas y ataques especiales únicos, diseñados para repartir libertad por todo el mundo. Modo Bro-Op (Broperativo) y Combate a muerte Enfréntate al terrorismo con hasta tres jugadores más en el modo cooperativo o corta lazos con tus bros y enfréntate a ellos en uno de los numerosos y bombásticos modos competitivos. Explosion Run (Carrera explosiva) Únete a otros bros para superar estos caóticos niveles contrarreloj mientras el terreno explota. Fully Destructible Everything (Entorno totalmente destruible) El terreno destruible ofrece un sinfín de posibilidades estratégicas, mientras que la abundancia de Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ (Barriles rojos explosivos de la justicia™) puede cambiar el panorama con solamente un disparo. Editor de niveles Diseña tu propio campo de juegos de destrucción con un potente editor de niveles y compártelo online para ser la envidia de todos los demás bros. Descubre, completa y puntúa incontables niveles creados por usuarios.

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, la mise à jour gratuite tant attendue du jeu le plus patriotique de 2015, refusée aux gamers épris de liberté pour un crime qu'elle n'a pas commis, s'est échappée d'une prison de haute sécurité pour expédier une mégatonne de carnage dans la tronche du mal.
 
 Cette ultime mise à jour propose une campagne améliorée et élargie avec du nouveau contenu à débloquer, six Bros ultra-patriotiques, quatre niveaux de défi pour répandre la démocratie, et le summum de la puissance militaire : des corrections de bugs !
 
 La meilleure façon d'en profiter pour les joueurs de la première heure est de rejouer au mode campagne, et d'y rejouer encore et encore, pour toujours et à jamais. DE NOUVEAUX BROS Mettez à profit l'esprit calculateur et la personnalité acide de Seth Brondle, maniez le chakram volant de Xebro, jouez la sérénade (et de la grenade) contre le terrorisme avec les mariachis du provocateur Desperabro, ou devenez le pire cauchemar de tous les monstres : une ado qui chasse les impies en lançant des pieux et revient à la vie toute seule comme une grande !
 
 Si vous êtes plutôt tireur d'élite, le célèbre chasseur d'insectes Burt Brommer et son fidèle fusil apportent la liberté avec une précision chirurgicale, tandis que Demolition Bro jette un froid chez les malfaiteurs avec ses Freeze Grenades (grenades givrantes). DE NOUVEAUX MÉCHANTS L'étendue du talent d'un Bro se mesure lorsqu'il est confronté à ceux qui cherchent à bafouer ses libertés, et dans Broforce Forever, les terroristes sont plus déterminés que jamais à anéantir la démocratie. Les Motorbike Maniacs (Fous du guidon) tenteront de vous écraser, tandis que les mitrailleuses, les barbelés, les sacs de sable et les dirigeables chargés de bazooka transformeront chaque excursion en territoire ennemi en une journée très, très chargée au buBro. DE NOUVEAUX DÉFIS Les Bros qui veulent toujours plus de bagarre peuvent montrer leurs biscotos dans les Muscle Temples (Temples du muscle), des défis où Indiana Brones doit braver de nouveaux degrés de menace, des ennemis et des dangers uniques. Si vous survivez, vous débloquerez l'une des quatre nouvelles frimes utilisables par n'importe quel Bro, n'importe où et n'importe quand. Comme la liberté !
 
  À propos du jeu Quand l'ombre du mal plane sur le monde, les nations se tournent vers la Broforce, une organisation paramilitaire sous-financée et surarmée qui ne jure que par l'usage excessif de la force. Mettez-vous sur le pied de guerre avec jusqu'à quatre joueurs, choisissez parmi des dizaines de Bros différents et canardez les forces terroristes qui menacent notre mode de vie. Déchaînez une multitude d'armes et faites pleuvoir le feu, le napalm et les membres dans des réactions en chaîne délirantes au nom de la liberté. La Broforce Semez le chaos et la terreur à votre sauce avec des dizaines de Bros, chacun doté d'un armement unique et d'attaques spéciales conçues pour répandre la liberté à travers le globe. Bro-Op et Deathmatch (match à mort) Combattez le terrorisme avec jusqu'à quatre joueurs en mode coopératif ou coupez les ponts avec vos potes dans plusieurs modes compétitifs déjantés. Explosion Run (course explosive) Rejoignez d'autres Bros dans ces niveaux uniques de course contre la montre et frayez-vous un chemin à travers des terrains absolument chaotiques. Destruction à volonté Les niveaux destructibles offrent une grande variété de stratégies, et les Barils rouges explosifs de la Justice™ en abondance vous permettent de raser le champ de bataille en un seul tir. Éditeur de niveaux Créez vos propres terrains de jeu explosifs grâce à un éditeur de niveaux performant et partagez-les en ligne pour rendre vos potes verts de jalousie. Parcourez des galeries entières de niveaux créés par d'autres joueurs et terminez-les pour évaluer leur degré de "Bro-titude".

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, das langersehnte Update für das patriotischste Videospiel des Jahres 2015, wurde freiheitsliebenden Spielern wegen eines nicht begangenen Verbrechens vorenthalten, entkam dem Hochsicherheitsknast und lässt nun ein Megagemetzel nach Kentucky-Art auf das Böse los.
 
 Dieses abschließende Update bietet eine verbesserte und erweiterte Kampagne mit neuen Freischaltungen, sowie sechs neue ultra-patriotische Bros, vier neue Herausforderungslevel zum Verbreiten der Demokratie und die ultimative Bekundung militärischer Macht: Fehlerbehebungen!
 
 Wer das Spiel schon kennt, kann all das durch erneutes Spielen der gesamten Kampagne am besten genießen. Und wieder und wieder. Für immer. NEUE BROS Nutze die berechnende Intelligenz und das Säurespeien von Seth Brondle, führe Xebros fliegendes Chakram, bring dem Terrorismus mit dem Mariachi-Hitzkopf Desperabro ein (explosives) Ständchen oder werde zum Albtraum aller Monster: eine Pflöcke schleudernde, Dämonen bekämpfende, sich selbst wiederbelebende, jugendliche Jägerin!
 
 Wenn präzise Schüsse eher dein Stil sind, kann der berühmte Insektenjäger Burt Brommer mit seinem zuverlässigen Gewehr punktgenaue Befreiung bringen, während Demolition Bros Freeze Grenades (Frostgranaten) Bösewichte AUF EIS legen, wie es sich gehört. NEUE SCHURKEN Ein Bro ist erst dann in seinem Element, wenn er gegen die antritt, die seine Freiheit vernichten wollen, und in Broforce Forever arbeiten die Terroristen noch entschlossener an der Auslöschung der Demokratie. Motorbike Maniacs (Motorradfanatiker) versuchen dich zu überfahren und machen jeden Besuch in besetztem Gebiet zusammen mit MG-Nestern, Stacheldraht, Sandsäcken und Luftschiffen voller Panzerfäuste zu einem sehr, sehr harten Weg, dir deine Bro-tchen zu verdienen. NEUE HERAUSFORDERUNGEN Bros, die noch größere Schlachten suchen, können sich in neuen Herausforderungsleveln beweisen: den Muscle Temples (Muskeltempeln). In jeder Kampagne muss Indiana Brones einen gefährlichen Tempel durchqueren, der ein neues Bedrohungsmeter sowie bestimmte Gegnertypen und Risiken bietet. Schaffe das, und du schaltest eines von vier neuen Muskelspielen frei, das jeder Bro dann jederzeit und überall einsetzen kann. Genau wie die Freiheit.
 
  Infos zum Spiel Wenn wieder einmal das Böse die Welt bedroht, muss die Broforce die Kastanien aus dem Feuer holen – eine unterfinanzierte, übermächtige paramilitärische Organisation, spezialisiert auf exzessive Gewaltanwendung. Ziehe mit bis zu drei Kumpels in die Schlacht und eliminiere in der Rolle dutzender „Bros“ die Terroristen, die unsere Lebensweise bedrohen. Setze eine Vielzahl einzigartiger Waffen ein und löse im Namen des Friedens unglaubliche Kettenreaktionen aus Feuer, Napalm und abgetrennten Gliedmaßen aus. Die Broforce Setze deine eigene Art von Schocktaktik ein und wähle aus dutzenden von Bros, wobei jeder mit eigenen Waffen und Spezialangriffen ausgestattet ist, die zum Verbreiten der Freiheit in der Welt entwickelt wurden. Bro-Op & Deathmatch Bekämpfe den Terrorismus in einem Koop-Team von bis zu vier Spielern oder wende dich gegen deine Bros und tritt in mehreren bombastischen Wettkampfmodi gegen sie an. Explosion Run (Explosionslauf) Tu dich mit anderen Bros zusammen und bewältige diese speziellen Level im Wettlauf gegen die Zeit, während das Gelände explodiert und alles im Chaos versinkt. Alles komplett zerstörbar Das zerstörbare Gelände eröffnet eine Fülle strategischer Optionen und dank der zahlreichen Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ (roten Explosivfässer der Gerechtigkeit™) kannst du das Spielfeld buchstäblich mit einem Schuss dem Erdboden gleichmachen. Level-Editor Gestalte mit dem robusten Level-Editor dein eigenes Spielfeld der Zerstörung und sichere dir den Neid der anderen Bros, indem du deine Kreationen online teilst. Durchstöbere zahllose von Nutzern erstellte Level und schließe sie ab, um ihre Bro-ness zu bewerten.

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, a tão esperada atualização grátis do jogo mais patriota de 2015, afastada dos amantes da liberdade por um crime que não cometeu, escapou de uma prisão de segurança máxima e vai soltar carnificina em doses industriais sobre toda e qualquer ameaça.
 
 A última atualização oferece uma campanha melhorada e expandida com novos itens a desbloquear, bem como seis novos Bros mega patriotas, quatro novos níveis de desafio por onde espalhar a democracia e a derradeira demonstração de poder militar: correções de erros!
 
 A melhor maneira de te divertires ao voltar ao jogo é espalhar brasas através da campanha toda. Uma e outra vez. Para sempre. NOVOS BROS Tira partido da inteligência calculista e do encanto cuspidor de ácido de Seth Brondle, empunha o Chakram voador da Xebro, faz uma serenata (explosiva) ao terrorismo com o mariachi Desperabro ou torna-te aquilo que os próprios monstros temem: uma Caçadora adolescente que lança estacas, faz purgas profanas e consegue ressuscitar!
 
 Se o teu estilo é mais o de atirador furtivo, o famoso caçador de insetos Burt Brommer conquista liberdade com a precisão da sua fiel carabina, enquanto as granadas congelantes do Demolition Bro devolvem os malfeitores a onde pertencem… AO GELO. NOVOS VILÕES Um Bro só usa a força quando é confrontado pela destruição da sua liberdade. E em Broforce Forever, os terroristas estão ainda mais determinados a eliminar a democracia. Os Motorbike Maniacs vão tentar atropelar-te e aplicar metralhadoras fixas, arame farpado, sacos de areia e dirigíveis carregados de bazucas, para tornar um autêntico martírio cada visita que fizeres ao território ocupado. NOVOS DESAFIOS Os Bros que procurem batalhas ainda mais imponentes podem mostrar os músculos em novos níveis de desafio conhecidos como Muscle Temples (Templos dos Músculos). Em cada campanha, o Indiana Brones terá de explorar um templo perigoso com um novo nível de ameaça, bem como inimigos de tipos e riscos específicos. Triunfa e desbloqueia uma de quatro novas poses que podem ser aplicadas por qualquer Bro, em qualquer altura, em qualquer lugar. Tal como a liberdade.
 
  Acerca do jogo Quando forças maléficas ameaçam o mundo, é chamada a Broforce, uma organização paramilitar com poucos recursos, mas com poder de sobra e que só trabalha na base da força bruta. Cerra os dentes e prepara-te para tiroteios explosivos com até quatro jogadores e dezenas de Bros diferentes. Elimina as forças terroristas que ameaçam o nosso modo de vida! Usa carradas de armas únicas e detona reações em cadeia de fogo, napalm e pedaços de inimigos… em nome da liberdade! A Broforce Causa choque e pavor à tua maneira com dezenas de Bros, cada um com o seu armamento e ataques especiais. Distribui resmas de liberdade pelo mundo fora. Bro-Op e Deathmatch (Todos contra todos) Combate o terrorismo com até quatro jogadores no modo cooperativo ou corta laços com os teus Bros e enfrentem-se em vários modos competitivos absolutamente bombásticos. Explosion Run (Fuga explosiva) Junta-te a outros Bros para enfrentar estes níveis contrarrelógio únicos sob a pressão de terrenos que explodem e um caos descomunal. Destrói tudo O terreno destrutível permite todo um leque de opções estratégicas, ao passo que a abundância de Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ (Barris Vermelhos Explosivos da Justiça™) pode literalmente nivelar o terreno com um único tiro. Editor de níveis Desenha o teu recreio de destruição com um robusto editor de níveis e faz inveja aos outros Bros ao partilhá-lo online. Também podes explorar os níveis criados por outros utilizadores e completá-los para avaliar se são mesmo dignos de um Bro.

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 『Broforce Forever』は、2015年に最も愛国心のあるゲームに向けた待望の無料大型アップデートだ！ 無実の罪で自由を愛するゲーマーから奪われていた本アップデートが、最高セキュリティーの収容所から今まさに脱出し、悪の組織にメガトン級の大虐殺を食らわせようとしている。
 
 この最終アップデートでは、6人の新たなアニキたちや、民主主義を広める4種類のチャレンジステージ、そして究極の軍事的表現であろうバグ修正が含まれ、改善と拡張がほどこされたキャンペーンを楽しむことができる！
 
 かつてのプレイヤーたちが『Broforce Forever』を楽しむための最善の方法は、もう一度全キャンペーンを遊びなおすことだ。さらに、もう一度。そして、永遠に…。 新たなアニキたち Seth Brondleの狡猾な知性と酸を撒き散らすような魅力を利用したり、Xebroの宙を舞うチャクラムを操ったり、フラメンコの火付け役Desperabroと共にセレナーデ（＆グレネード）のテロを引き起こしたり…もしくは、自己再生するティーンエイシャーのSlayerになり、怪物たちが杭によって浄化される悪夢を見てしまうような存在となろう！
 
 もしスナイピングのほうが好みに合うのなら、有名な虫ハンターBro Gummerが信頼するライフルを手に極めて正確な自由をもたらし、Demolition Broの凍結グレネードが悪の軍勢を氷の中へと再度封じ込めてくれる。 新たな宿敵 アニキは自由を破壊しようと企む者たちと対峙することで初めて力を発揮するが、『Broforce Forever』では、テロリストたちが民主主義を破壊する決意をより一層強固なものにしている。Motorbike Maniacsはアニキたちを追跡しながら、機関銃、有刺鉄線、土のうの設置やバズーカを積んだ飛行船を呼び込もうとし、アニキたちにとって最悪の一日を占領地で毎度お見舞いしてくるだろう。 新たなチャレンジ Muscle Templesとして知られる新しいチャレンジステージでは、さらに大規模な戦いを求めるアニキたちの筋肉を鍛え上げることができる。各キャンペーンでIndiana Bronesに課せられるのは、新たな危険度、特殊な敵タイプ、危険物が登場する寺院のナビゲートだ。見事に成功すれば、すべてのアニキがいつでもどこでも使用できる4種類のうち1種類の新たな力がアンロックされる。そう、まるで自由そのもののようにだ。
 
  ゲームについて 世界に悪がはびこるとき、彼らが立ちあがる。金はなくとも超火力、やるときはやる（やりすぎる）準軍事組織、その名もブロフォース！ 最大4人でのプレイが可能。問答無用で銃を撃ちまくりながら、ステージを駆け抜けろ。操作可能なアニキは数十人におよぶ。ユニークな武器も多数登場。爆発に次ぐ爆発、連鎖するナパーム、四散する肉体。平和を脅かすテロリストを相手に、自由の名の下に好き放題やれ。 The Broforce 世界中に自由をもたらすために作られたユニークな武器と特殊攻撃を備えた数十人のアニキたちと共に、衝撃と畏怖たる我々の名を世に轟かせよう。 協力＆デスマッチ 最大4人のプレイヤーと協力モードでテロリストに対抗したり、アニキたちの絆を断ち切り、激しい対戦モードで対決したりしよう。 爆発だらけのラン 他のアニキたちと合流し、爆発する地形と大規模なカオスが待ち構えるユニークなタイムアタックステージに挑戦しよう。 破壊できぬ物はなし 破壊可能な地形が多くの戦略を生み出す中で、大量の「正義の爆発性赤バレル™」は一撃で戦場を更地へと変える。 ステージ・エディット 屈強なステージ・エディットを使ってデザインした自身の戦場をオンラインで共有して、世界中のアニキたちの羨望の的となろう。プレイヤーが作り出したステージをチェックしてクリアしたら、彼らのアニキ度合いを評価してあげよう。

BROFORCE FOREVER     
 Broforce Forever, the long-awaited free update to 2015’s most patriotic video game, held back from freedom-loving gamers for a crime it didn’t commit, has promptly escaped from a maximum security stockade and unleashes a megaton of Kentucky-fried carnage into the face of evil.
 
 The final update offers an improved and expanded campaign with new unlocks, along with six new ultra-patriotic bros, four new democracy-spreading challenge levels, and the ultimate expression of military might – bug fixes!
 
 The best way for a returning player to enjoy this is to play through the entire campaign again. And again. Forever. NEW BROS Harness the calculating intelligence and acid-spitting allure of Seth Brondle, wield Xebro’s flying Chakram, serenade (and grenade) terrorism with the flamenco firebrand Desperabro, or become the thing monsters have nightmares about, a stake throwing, unholy purging, self-resurrecting teenage Slayer!
 
 If sniping is more your style, famed bug hunter Bro Gummer brings pinpoint liberation with his trusty rifle, while Demolition Bro’s Freeze Grenades put evildoers right back where they belong… ON ICE. NEW BADDIES A Bro only becomes a force when confronted with those who seek to destroy their freedoms, and in Broforce Forever, the terrorists are even more determined to delete democracy. Motorbike Maniacs will try to run you down, while machine gun placements, barbed wire, sandbags and bazooka-laden blimps conspire to make each visit to occupied territory a very, very bad day at the broffice. NEW CHALLENGES Bros in search of even bigger battles can flex their muscles in new challenge levels known as Muscle Temples. Each campaign tasks Indiana Brones with navigating a perilous temple that features a new Threat Level and specific enemy types and hazards. Succeed and unlock one of four new flexes that can be deployed by any Bro, any time, any place. Just like freedom.
 
  About the Game When evil threatens the world, the world calls on Broforce - an under-funded, over-powered paramilitary organization dealing exclusively in excessive force. Brace your loins with up to four players to run ‘n’ gun as dozens of different bros and eliminate the opposing terrorist forces that threaten our way of life. Unleash scores of unique weapons and set off incredible chain reactions of fire, napalm, and limbs in the name of freedom.
 
     The Broforce Deliver your own brand of shock and awe with dozens of bros each with their own unique weaponry and special attacks designed to dispatch freedom across the world. Bro-Op & Deathmatch Battle terrorism with up to four players in cooperative mode or sever ties with your bros and face each other in several bombastic competitive modes. Explosion Run Join up with other bros to tackle these unique time attack levels under the pressure of exploding terrains and mass chaos. Fully Destructible Everything Destructible terrain opens up a slew of strategic options while the abundance of Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ can literally level the playing field with one shot. Level Editor Design your own playground of destruction with a robust level editor and become the envy of all the other bros by sharing them online. Browse through scores of custom user created levels and complete them to rate their Bro-ness.

ゲーム
当邪恶威胁世界时,世界就会呼唤 Broforce,-一个资金不足但能力过硬、专门处理极端组织的准军事组织。 挺直腰板,与其他几十个兄弟一样奔跑、开火,消灭威胁到我们生活方式的恐怖主义。 释放数十种独特的武器,以自由之名掀起一系列对于火、烧夷弹、肢体等不可思议的连锁反应。
